summary: CRM Timeline Enhanced Export Testing (Iteration 177) - ALL 17 backend tests PASSED. Frontend verified with correct stats bar (63 Total, 53 Salesperson, 10 Customer, 0 Notes), direction badges (blue 'Salesperson', green 'Customer'), and event content displayed.
critical_code_review_comments: Backend correctly fetches from 5 data sources: contact_events, messages, campaign_enrollments, congrats_cards_sent, broadcast_recipients
Direction classification working: inbound_types set correctly identifies customer engagement events
message_outbound events correctly include full_content and description fields
Frontend stats bar correctly calculates: outboundCount (53) and inboundCount (10)
Direction badges render correctly: 'Salesperson' (blue #007AFF) for outbound, 'Customer' (green #30D158) for inbound

success_rate.frontend: 100% - Timeline page loads, stats display correctly, direction badges working

seed_data_creation: None - used existing test contact with token c873848e-0ab2-435e-8418-de3ff4c3cb85
context_for_next_testing_agent: CRM Timeline Enhanced Export feature fully working. Backend endpoint GET /api/crm/timeline/{token} returns complete activity history from 5 collections. Frontend at /timeline/{token} displays direction badges (Salesperson/Customer) and stats bar. Test contact has 63 events: 53 outbound (salesperson actions), 10 inbound (customer engagement). ScrollView in React Native Web captures scroll, so full_page screenshots may not capture all events - this is a known limitation.

backend_data_sources.contact_events: PASS - 63 events fetched from contact_events collection
backend_data_sources.campaign_enrollments: PASS - 1 campaign_enrolled event with campaign name
backend_data_sources.congrats_cards_sent: PASS - Card sent events classified as outbound

direction_classification.outbound_events: PASS - Salesperson actions (calls, SMS, emails, cards, campaigns) = outbound
direction_classification.inbound_events: PASS - Customer engagement (*_viewed, customer_reply, review_page_viewed) = inbound

message_content.full_content_field: PASS - message_outbound events include full message body
message_content.description_field: PASS - Truncated preview (120 chars) in description

frontend_display.activity_timeline: PASS - Events grouped by date with icons and timestamps
frontend_display.event_descriptions: PASS - Content visible for card views, campaigns, messages

mocked_apis.Twilio SMS: MOCKED - Personal SMS goes through native SMS app
